title: Example Project (delete me)
summary: Demonstrates how Decap CMS writes a portfolio entry into content/projects/. Delete me from /admin/.
story: This file proves the pipeline end-to-end. When Decap commits a new project, content-loader.js picks it up on the next page-load and the entry appears on portfolio.html plus its own project.html?id=… page.
outcome: Adding products no longer requires editing JS.
